title: a Billion Grains of Green Sand
description: This mod provides a legendary adventure through the green sand dimension.
body:
![Green Sand Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df93f9d517ff82596d73c9b511d9f2d3dc2f27a6.png)

In this mod, you are able to go to the Green Sand Dimension. This mod has;
- Multiple Dungeons
- blocks
- items
- foods
- weapons
- creatures
  
You can use Chiseled Green Sand Stone Brick to build the portal frame, this can be obtained through crafting or using the stone cutter

<details>
<summary>Portal</summary>

![Green Sand Dimension Portal](https://imgur.com/NF2orf2.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>General Gameplay Help</summary>

**Dino revival**

To resurrect the dinosaurs you must first find their fossils. Some fossils will be generated near the surface, while some will be generated farther underground. You can also find the bone blocks required in the Boneyard dungeon.

Once you have acquired the necessary bones for the dino of your choice you must use various machines to bring them back to life, the recipes for which are in the recipe section. The required machines are:
- DNA Extractor
- DNA Splicer
- Egg Incubator

Once you have the egg block you must place it down somewhere, preferably with enough room not to suffocate the dinos when they hatch. It will take around 15 minutes to hatch.

**Scrap blocks**

Inside some structures, you will find scrap blocks. These are what you can find in the various scrap blocks.

Village
- Ricochet Ball
- Figure shards
- Greenana Tree Sapling
- Greenberrys
- Geed
- Random other stuff

Wizard
- Wizard clothing
- Neutral Spellbooks
- Greenberrys
- Geed
- Random other stuff

**Magic**

To do magic you must first obtain a magic staff. You can do so by defeating a dark wizard in a wizard tower basement. Once you have a depowered wizard staff you must bring it up to the wizard at the top of the tower where you can buy upgrades for your staff. The stronger your staff the better your spells will be, currently there are 3 tiers. 

While using a better staff will improve the spell, another way to make your spells better is by wearing wizard clothing. If you are wearing wizard clothing that aligns with the type of spell you are using, it will boost the spell power for that spell.

To use a spellbook put the book in your off hand, and hold your staff in your main hand. Then right-click to activate the spell. Currently, there are 16 spells, however, more are likely to be added eventually in the future.

This is a list of all the spellbooks you can obtain:

Water
- Water beam
- Explosive Bubble
- Water spout

Earth
- Rock Throw
- Minion Summoning
- Sandstorm

Fire
- Flamethrower
- Molten Explosive
- Circle of Fire

Neutral
- Lightning Strike
- Healing 
- You Shall Not Pass
- Location Reveal
- Launch
- Poison
- Levitation 

</details>

<details>
<summary>list of every single mob in the mod</summary>

_I don't think I can resize images with this so some of these are kinda large._

**Green Sand Pig**

![Green Sand Pig](https://imgur.com/I21PQqJ.png)

Can be found in the white forest. Drops 1 - 3 bacon.

**Green Sand Embedded Cow**

![Green Sand Embedded Cow](https://imgur.com/m4lMIse.png)

Can be found in green sand dunes. Drops 1 - 3 Green Sand Embedded Steak

**Green Sand Wanderer**

![Green Sand Wanderer](https://imgur.com/YiKZBd1.png)

Can be found anywhere, or in huts. May drop sword

**Pile of Sand**

![Pile of Sand](https://imgur.com/aebtrxa.png)

Can spawn in green sand dunes, or white forests. Drops Green sand, or plastic shovel, or green sand.

**Green Sand Guardian**

![Green Sand Guardian](https://imgur.com/bthmazw.png)

Found in the Sand Abomination castle. May drop a sword.

**Green Sand Worm**

![Green Sand Worm](https://imgur.com/OpTThyo.png)

Found in various structures. Drops 0 - 3 worm fangs.

**Forest Guardian**

![Forest Guardian](https://imgur.com/H0rHUXo.png)

Found in the Eternal Tree Stump. Drops sword, and skull. 

**Mini Tree**

![Mini Tree](https://imgur.com/BOX6XpY.png)

Found in the Eternal Tree Stump. May drop green sand wood.

**Sand Abomination**

![Sand Abomination](https://imgur.com/ngumY85.png)

Found in Sand Abomination castle. Drops skull and BLT cannon.

**Nyeef**

![Nyeef](https://imgur.com/IDj8qSD.png)

Nyeef can be found in his castle. Nyeef is the third most powerful being in the universe. He is relatively peaceful and lives on top of his castle. If you hit him he will kill you extremely quickly. Drops his afro

**Green Sandosarous**

![Green Sandosarous](https://imgur.com/Cp0uv2n.png)

Can be hatched from an egg. Can be ridden after being equipped with a saddle. Upon pressing space you can charge at your enemies. Drops 1 - 2 Green Sandosarous Eyes.

**Gretagotitand**

![Gretagotitand](https://imgur.com/xIjSlV7.png)

Can be hatched from an egg. Can be equipped with large chests to carry your items. Drops 1 - 3 Gretagotitand Skin

**Giant Worm**

![Giant Worm](https://imgur.com/WjOPIH4.png)

Can be hatched from an egg. Can be ridden after being equipped with a saddle. Goes faster on Sand.
Drops 1 - 3 Giant Worm pieces

**Grekylosandstone**

![Grekylosandstone](https://imgur.com/JM52RRO.png)

Can be hatched from an egg. Can be ridden after being equipped with a saddle. This mob has a thorns-like effect when attacked. Drops 1 - 3 Grekylosandstone Spikes.

**No-Internet Dino**

![No-Internet Dino](https://imgur.com/Hk6onPt.png)

Can be hatched from an egg. Can be ridden. When pressing space it will jump.

**Mega Chicken**

![Mega Chicken](https://imgur.com/N5rYh5n.png)

Can be hatched from an egg. Can be ridden after being equipped with a saddle. After pressing space it will lay an explosive egg launching it into the air. Drops 2 eternal chicken legs.

**Green Sand Minions**

![Green Sand Minions](https://imgur.com/1865iOV.png)

Can be summoned with the magic staff. Will follow you if you hold a staff, and will attack enemies. If there is no one to follow and no one to fight they will stand still. 

**Wizards**

![Wizards](https://imgur.com/RAQ7eA4.png)

Can be found in the Wizard Towers. The wizards are thousands of years old and are talented with magic. They are peaceful and will trade with you granting you staff upgrades, and spell books. 

**Dark Wizards**

![Dark Wizards](https://imgur.com/Ur51P4d.png)

Dark wizards can be found in the basement of the Wizard Towers. Drops a depowered wizard staff.

**Skeleton Minion**

![Skeleton Minion](https://imgur.com/7ZvdECt.png)

Found in the Boneyard. 

**Skeletal Amalgamation**

![Skeletal Amalgamation](https://imgur.com/bXXf3JK.png)

Found in the Boneyard. Drops skull. Also drops sword, or Skeletal Amalgamation Orb.

**Mummy**

![Mummy](https://imgur.com/Kl0ZMEB.png)

Found in the Giant Pyramid. Drops 0 - 2 rotten flesh.

**Pharaoh**

![Pharaoh](https://imgur.com/SFPKPon.png)

Found in Giant Pyramid. Drops Soul Scepter.

**Vent Crawler**

![Vent Crawler](https://imgur.com/mxED7NI.png)

Found roaming the vents of the crashed Zultrion spaceship. These creatures will jump at you in an attempt to latch onto your skull. If killed with a crowbar you can wear them as a hat. 

**Zultrion Space Soldiers**

![Zultrion Space Soldiers](https://imgur.com/MPvh840.png)

All can be found in the crashed Zultrion spaceship. May drop armor corresponding to what they are wearing.

**Zultrite Defense Robots**

![Zultrite Defense Robots](https://imgur.com/fISaJpm.png)

Will be spawned to support the Zultrite Ship Commander.

**Zultrite Ship Comander**

![Zultrite Ship Comander](https://imgur.com/dvQTuIV.png)

Can be found in the crashed Zultrion spaceship. Will drop skull and rocket launcher

**Ghost Pirates**

![Ghost Pirates](https://imgur.com/idnDr2d.png)

Long dead and determined not to die, are the ghost pirates. They can be found in the sky pirate ships. May drop weapons corresponding to what they are holding.

**Scare!**

![Scare!](https://imgur.com/isjhKnW.png)

Summoned by Ghost Beard to support him in battle.

**Ghost Beard**

![Ghost Beard](https://imgur.com/QUWbqyr.png)

Ghost beard can be found in the sky pirate ships he is the captain of. Drops his hat and hook. 

**Greenbob**

![Greenbob](https://imgur.com/2AedZIw.png)

Found captive in the sky pirate ships. Will sell you various items.

</details>


<details>
<summary>All the structures in the mod</summary>

**Pyramid**

![Pyramid](https://imgur.com/1q5NhD6.png)

Various items can be found in the chests located here.

**Eternal Tree Stump**

![Eternal Tree Stump](https://imgur.com/hKlwFjN.png)

Various items can be found in the chests located here. Aswell as the Forest Guardian.

**Sand Abomination Castle**

![Sand Abomination Castle](https://imgur.com/eR78r0m.png)

Various items can be found in the chests located here. Aswell as the Sand Abomination.

**Wanderer Hut**

![Wanderer Hut](https://imgur.com/LUQHW9V.png)

Various items can be found in the chest located here.

**Nyeef's Castle**

![Nyeef's Castle](https://imgur.com/dNWhrwZ.png)

Nyeef has various blocks and foods in his castle. Such as the fried chicken, or fries. His prized possessions are to be found nowhere else.

**Wizard Towers**

![Wizard Towers](https://imgur.com/CeO5GeS.png)

Home to wizards, prison of dark wizards.

**Bone Yard**

![Bone Yard](https://imgur.com/8cFQmfS.png)

Various items can be found in the chests located here, such as no-internet dino bones. The Skeletal Amalgamation can be found here.

**Abandon Villages**

![Abandon Villages](https://imgur.com/Ulnj0HA.png)

Lost to time and covered in sand. The scrap blocks in this village contain many lost artifacts. You may wake the undead if you're not careful.

**Giant Pyramid**

![Giant Pyramid](https://imgur.com/2a8wUA2.png)

Larger pyramids, created for only the most significant figures of their time. While scrap blocks exist inside I could not figure out anything interesting to put in these ones so it's mostly just sandite stuff. More notably you can find the Pharaoh resting inside his coffin deep inside the pyramid.

**Crashed Zultrion Ship**

![Crashed Zultrion Ship](https://imgur.com/OY6VD5k.png)

Crashed an unknown amount of time ago after the destruction of their planet, the Zultrion ships contain large amounts of unique armor, tools, and weapons, as well as enemies to fight.

**Sky Pirate Ship**

![Sky Pirate Ship](https://imgur.com/WF532Dn.png)

Controlled by the dead who refuse to die, are the sky pirate ships. They are scattered with functional cannons, and much loot to plunder.

**Crumbled Wizard Towers**

![Crumbled Wizard Towers](https://imgur.com/DfqYzYI.png)

![Crumbled Wizard Towers](https://imgur.com/4GuRhyp.png)

The crumbled wizard towers are all that remains of the more unlucky wizards. Inside and around them you will find various scrap blocks containing magical artifacts, such as neutral spells and wizard clothing. If you are not careful you might wake the dead in some of them.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Some of the available foods.</summary>

![Some of the available foods](https://imgur.com/eeoKLmr.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Weapons with no recipes.</summary>

**BLT Cannon**

![BLT Cannon](https://imgur.com/Io165eh.png)

Dropped from Sand Abomination. Uses BLT as ammo.

**Forest Guardian Sword**

![Forest Guardian Sword](https://imgur.com/YdcYx6G.png)

Dropped from Forest Guardian

**Sandite Shotgun**

![Sandite Shotgun](https://imgur.com/xbwKFjJ.png)

Found in chests inside some structures. Uses sandite ammo.

**Skeletal Amalgamation Sword**

![Skeletal Amalgamation Sword](https://imgur.com/HQQw6R1.png)

Dropped from Skeletal Amalgamation.

**Soul Scepter**

![Soul Scepter](https://imgur.com/I4Ujpgo.png)

Dropped from Pharaoh. Killing entities charges up the attack. Upon right-clicking it will summon a heat-seeking vengeful soul attack.

**Laser Rifle**

![Laser Rifle](https://imgur.com/jklLpvi.png)

Found inside crashed zultrion spaceship. Uses laser ammo.

**Laser Pistol**

![Laser Pistol](https://imgur.com/oJd5ONO.png)

Found inside crashed zultrion spaceship. Uses laser ammo.

**Plasma Blade**

![Plasma Blade](https://imgur.com/qateEO1.png)

Found inside crashed zultrion spaceship.

**Rocket Launcher**

![Rocket Launcher](https://imgur.com/5C9Vody.png)

Dropped from Zultrite Ship Commander. Uses rockets as ammo.

**Pirate Cutlass**

![Pirate Cutlass](https://imgur.com/zahd9NU.png)

Found in the sky pirate ship.

**Flintlock**

![Flintlock](https://imgur.com/yg0AvEP.png)

Found in the sky pirate ship. Uses sandite ammo

**Blunderbuss**

![Blunderbuss](https://imgur.com/wmMfu7d.png)

Found in the sky pirate ship. Uses sandite ammo.

**Ghost Captain Hook**

![Ghost Captain Hook](https://imgur.com/EzEbr22.png)

Dropped from Ghost Beard. 

</details>


<details>
<summary>all of the armor in the mod.</summary>

![Sets of Armor](https://imgur.com/59Bjfms.png)

Sandite armors is crafted of sandite. Afro is from Nyeef. Dino armor is from dinos.

![Sets of Wizard Clothing](https://imgur.com/075nATK.png)

The wizard clothing can be found in the crumbled wizard tower scrap blocks.

![Space suit stuff](https://imgur.com/xMSW2Zb.png)

The spacesuits can be found in the crashed ship.

![Sky Pirate Stuff](https://imgur.com/A69B5Sh.png)

These can be found from GreenBob, and the sky pirate ship.

</details>

**Trailer:**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/2WDlR2sb-zM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod was made with MCreator.

This is a link to Mcreator - [**MCreator**](https://mcreator.net/)


I will not make a Fabric version of this mod. 

 
This mod will stay in 1.16.5 for the foreseeable future.



**Notes:**

It is suggested not to play with particles at minimum during the dark wizard fights as you may not see some of their attacks. However, it will reduce lag from the waterspouts.

In the case that too many large structures are generated near each other the game may crash. This should be pretty rare, but you may want to create backups every once in a while.

Lettuce printers placed before version 3.0 will have to be be replaced for them to function correctly.

If you cant find one of your mobs, and they are from this mod, look south east. For whatever reasons mobs tend to go south east.

Tell me if any other issues are found.

--

Go and download the other 2 mods that me and Trex777 have created!
- The Villager Grinder Mod
- Horrors of the Meat
